title: Library of Congress: Irish Immigration and Relocation
description: A source card for a Library of Congress presentation on Irish immigration in U.S. history.

pages.text: This Library of Congress presentation places Irish immigration inside a larger Immigration and Relocation in U.S. History collection.
Students can trace push and pull factors such as religious conflict, political conditions, economic hardship, land ownership, labor, discrimination, adaptation, and cultural influence.
Use this source card as a doorway to primary-source investigation rather than a final text. Library of Congress collection items carry their own rights statements.
